response.overview: After Razif and his family, along with several villagers, were put to sleep for two years due to the Covid-19 pandemic, they were all jolted awake with new identities to confuse the Sweet Clove gang who continued to threaten their safety. For greater security, they now live in a flat housing complex in a city. To cover up Pacerat's own mistake, Agent Shukrinah and Agent 1 are forced to lie to Laila, claiming that Jaafar's brain had to be transferred into the body of the mute Badrul. However, Razif and Laila's family manage to expose the agenda of these two Pacerat agents and begin strategizing to trap them again. Moving to this new area is not an easy matter. Razif also faces problems with the flat residents. Since losing Jaafar, Laila suffers from prolonged depression, but this never breaks her spirit to continue searching for Jaafar. Will Razif's family and villagers be able to overcome all the challenges and trials that await them?
response.title: Kampung People 3
